task: Audit and fix PPTX export compatibility with agent-modified content (Task #506)
result: Fixed PPTX export to handle all agent output types. Key changes: (1) TipTapTransformer now preserves rich text formatting (bold/italic/underline) via new extractTextWithFormatting() function, (2) PPTX Generator now correctly reads subheadlines from slide.subheadlines[] array instead of incorrectly searching content items, (3) Added comprehensive documentation at top of pptx-generator.ts
